title: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice
reviews: Visually stunning but emotionally hollow
Disappointing mess of wasted potential
Dark brooding spectacle lacks heart
Too serious for its own good
Ambitious failure with redeeming moments
Overstuffed plot kills character development
Beautiful cinematography saves terrible writing
Grim tone drains all the fun
Snyder's vision feels coldly calculated
Batman kills people now apparently
Martha scene ruins climactic moment
Justice League setup overshadows actual story
Cavill deserved much better Superman material
Affleck's Batman surprisingly works despite everything
Three hour slog tests viewer patience
Wonderwoman steals every scene completely
Doomsday looks like generic CGI monster
Director's cut slightly improves original disaster
Needed more hope less brooding darkness
Divisive entry splits fanbase permanently apart
